name: Stephen Joseph Twohig's Children
researcher_question: Did Stephen Joseph Twohig have any children beyond the two already linked in the FamilySearch tree (Genevieve "Jennie" Ballard and Robert P. Twohig)?
notes: Ground truth was independently cross-validated by two separate research runs before being finalized. The subject's surname is heavily OCR-garbled across records (Twohig/Toohig/Twoking/Tnohig/Zwohig), which is part of the intended difficulty. Two census sources already attached to the subject's own tree record cite unrelated-looking names (a household member's married surname); recognizing these as genuine multi-person household records rather than dismissing them as misattached is a key part of the task.
